summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 2 testing of TeachBack AI waitlist landing page. All backend APIs (20/20) and frontend UI flows are working correctly. Tested new Phase 2 features: consent requirement, personalization fields (persona/mainGoal/subject), iPad + Apple Pencil + Phone hero composition, interactive Personalization section with live updates, MiniDemo section, legal pages (/privacy, /terms, /data-compliance), and footer with .dev emails. The critical consent checkbox requirement is working perfectly - submit button is disabled until consent is checked.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok'}
Backend: GET /api returns {message: 'TeachBack AI API is running'}
Backend: GET /api/waitlist/count returns {count: N}
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with valid email + consentAccepted=true returns success
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with duplicate email returns duplicate status
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with 6 invalid email formats returns 422 validation error
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with consentAccepted=false returns HTTP 400 with message about Privacy Policy/Terms/Data & Compliance
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with consent omitted returns HTTP 400 with message about Privacy Policy/Terms/Data & Compliance
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with persona/mainGoal/subject stores all fields correctly
Backend: POST /api/waitlist with unknown persona ('unknown-role') silently clears it (still 200/success)
Backend: GET /api/waitlist/export returns HTTP 404 when ADMIN_TOKEN not set
Backend: Email normalization - spaces and case handled correctly
Backend: Honeypot field 'hp' returns success but does NOT write to database
Backend: Count increments after successful signup
Frontend: Hero device composition present - hero-devices container with hero-ipad, hero-phone, and hero-stylus (Apple Pencil)
Frontend: iPad preview shows TeachBack AI logo, Current Session, subject label (Biology · Mitosis), Uploaded Notes, Warm-Up Questions, and Study Plan · This Week with 7-day grid
Frontend: Phone preview shows Session Results, Overall Score 87, Feynman Verdict, Strengths, Gaps, Retention bar (72%), XP +120, and Streak 5 days
Frontend: Personalization section present with 3 chip pickers (Study Mode, Subject, Persona)
Frontend: Clicking study-mode-exam-prep chip selects it (aria-pressed=true) and updates personalization-mode-blurb with exam prep content
Frontend: Clicking subject-chemistry chip updates personalization-subject-summary to 'Chemistry'
Frontend: Clicking persona-student chip updates personalization-persona-summary to 'Student'
Frontend: iPad subject (ipad-preview-subject) updates to Chemistry after selection in Personalization
Frontend: MiniDemo section (demo-section) present with demo-card showing score, retention, XP, verdict
Frontend: Demo subject line (demo-subject-line) shows Chemistry + Exam Prep after personalization selections
Frontend: Demo verdict (demo-verdict) updates based on study mode selection
Frontend: Waitlist headline (waitlist-headline) shows 'Find your gaps before the test does.'
Frontend: Waitlist CTA line (waitlist-cta-line) shows 'Get early access to study smarter.' for Student persona
Frontend: CRITICAL - Submit button (waitlist-submit-button) is DISABLED when consent checkbox (waitlist-consent-checkbox) is unchecked
Frontend: Submit button becomes ENABLED when consent checkbox is checked
Frontend: Consent label (waitlist-consent-label) contains 3 clickable links: Privacy Policy (waitlist-link-privacy), Terms (waitlist-link-terms), Data & Compliance (waitlist-link-compliance)
Frontend: Valid email submission with consent checked shows success message 'You're on the list. We'll email you when early access opens.'
Frontend: Duplicate email submission shows 'You're already on the waitlist. We'll email you when early access opens.'
Frontend: Invalid email format ('not-an-email') shows error 'That email does not look right.'
Frontend: Personalization toggle (waitlist-toggle-options) reveals optional persona/goal/subject selects (waitlist-options)
Frontend: Footer (footer) shows TeachBack AI brand, mission 'Learn it by teaching it.', and three .dev emails: hello@teachback.dev, support@teachback.dev, updates@teachback.dev
Frontend: Footer contains legal links: footer-link-privacy, footer-link-terms, footer-link-compliance
Frontend: Privacy page (/privacy) loads with privacy-page testid, title 'Privacy Policy', legal-back-link, and mentions support@teachback.dev
Frontend: Terms page (/terms) loads with terms-page testid, title 'Terms and Conditions', legal-back-link, and mentions hello@teachback.dev and support@teachback.dev

Frontend: Data & Compliance page (/data-compliance) loads with data-compliance-page testid, title 'Data & Compliance Notice', legal-back-link, mentions consent requirement, IP hashing, and support@teachback.dev for removal requests
